label: Animals generator
description: Generates animals for sale or purchase based on trade tags, wildness, and temperature filters. Supports optional mating pair creation.

tradeTagsSell.label: Trade tags (sell)
tradeTagsSell.description: Trade tags for animals this trader sells to the player. Matched against PawnKindDef.race.tradeTags.

tradeTagsBuy.label: Trade tags (buy)
tradeTagsBuy.description: Trade tags for animals this trader buys from the player. Matched against PawnKindDef.race.tradeTags.

createMatingPair.label: Create mating pair
createMatingPair.description: Trade tags for animals that should be generated as a mating pair (one male, one female) when stock is created.

kindCountRange.label: Kind count range
kindCountRange.description: Number of distinct PawnKindDefs to include in the generated animal stock. Source default IntRange(1, 1).

minWildness.label: Min wildness
minWildness.description: Minimum wildness value an animal PawnKindDef must have to be eligible. Source default 0.

maxWildness.label: Max wildness
maxWildness.description: Maximum wildness value an animal PawnKindDef may have to be eligible. Source default 1.

checkTemperature.label: Check temperature
checkTemperature.description: If true, only animals whose temperature tolerance overlaps the current map tile temperature are eligible. Source default true.
